spine_source: TDLR Electrical Sign Contractor (ESC) bulk CSV
filters_applied: TX counties only (exclude OUT OF STATE)
Exclude franchise units (FastSigns, Signs Now, SpeedPro, Image360, Sign-A-Rama, Alphagraphics)
Exclude platform subsidiaries (Stratus/Comet, YESCO, Stewart, Persona, Daktronics, Watchfire)
Dedupe by (legal_name, city); kept older license number on ties
Sort by priority county (Harris/Dallas/Tarrant/Travis/Bexar/border + suburbs/coastal) then ascending license # (older = better)
